subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. 1912-10-20 in Los Angeles
subcodes.first_line: The believers must not expect anything from one another... I have traveled and come as far as here... Look at the people of the world
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @the soul as soil; cultivation of the soul, @spiritual prerequisites of teaching the Cause, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @definitions of a Baha'i; qualities of a Baha'i
